ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fpga_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FPGA device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the FPGA device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model number of the FPGA device */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the FPGA device */,
  "device_family" TEXT /* Family of the FPGA device (e.g., Virtex, Spartan, Kintex) */,
  "device_speed_grade" TEXT /* Speed grade of the FPGA device (e.g., -1, -2, -3) */,
  "device_package_type" TEXT /* Package type of the FPGA device (e.g., BGA, QFP, CSP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FPGA device the bank belongs to */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_description" TEXT /* Description of the bank */,
  "bank_type" TEXT /* Type of the bank (e.g., GPIO, configuration, initialization) */,
  "bank_voltage" REAL /* Voltage of the bank (e.g., 1.2V, 1.8V, 2.5V) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_banks_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES fpga_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bank the pin belongs to */,
  "pin_name" TEXT /* Name of the pin */,
  "pin_description" TEXT /* Description of the pin */,
  "pin_number" TEXT /* Number of the pin */,
  "pin_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the pin (e.g., input, output, bidirectional) */,
  "pin_type" TEXT /* Type of the pin (e.g., single-ended, differential) */,
  "pin_drive_strength" TEXT /* Drive strength of the pin (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pins_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("bank_id") REFERENCES banks ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin the connection belongs to */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device the connection is made to */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., XC2V40, XC2V80) */,
  "connection_speed" REAL /* Speed of the connection (e.g., 100 MHz, 200 MHz) */,
  "connection_delay" REAL /* Delay of the connection (e.g., 1 ns, 2 ns) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connections_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FPGA device the history belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the configuration change */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the FPGA device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_history_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES fpga_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin the usage belongs to */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FPGA device the usage belongs to */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the pin has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the pin was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_usage_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES fpga_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_usage_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflict_detection" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict entry */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin the conflict belongs to */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the FPGA device the conflict belongs to */,
  "conflict_type" TEXT /* Type of conflict (e.g., signal, power, timing) */,
  "conflict_description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_detection_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_detection_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES fpga_devices ("device_id")
)
